summary: Comprehensive testing of price filter, sort by price, inactive partners, and search booking_url features. All 19 backend tests passed. All 12 frontend tests passed. Price filter pills work correctly, sort toggle cycles through states, 59 hotels displayed, search returns booking_url from contact_url fallback.

backend_api.all_partners_endpoint: PASS - Returns 200 with 59 hotels, all have is_active field
backend_api.all_partners_includes_inactive: PASS - Returns all partners (no is_active filter)
backend_api.new_hotels_offer_price: PASS - 21+ new hotels have offer_price (no discount_percent)
backend_api.search_steigenberger: PASS - Returns result with booking_url = https://www.steigenberger.com
backend_api.search_active_only: PASS - Search returns only active partners

frontend_ui.price_filter_bar: PASS - All 4 filter pills visible (All, Under €200, €200-€400, €400+)
frontend_ui.sort_toggle: PASS - Sort by Price toggle visible and cycles: null → asc → desc → null
frontend_ui.hotel_count_59: PASS - Shows '59 hotels' in filter bar
frontend_ui.filter_click_active: PASS - Clicking filter changes active state (bg-stone-800)
frontend_ui.no_console_errors: PASS - No JavaScript errors on page

passed_tests: Price filter pills (All, Under €200, €200-€400, €400+) work correctly
Sort by Price toggle cycles: Sort by Price → Price ↑ → Price ↓ → Sort by Price
59 hotels displayed with '59 hotels' count in filter bar
Old hotels show 'Save X%' discount badges
/api/all-partners returns all partners including inactive (is_active field present)
/api/search returns only active partners with booking_url from contact_url fallback
Search 'steigenberger' returns result with booking_url = https://www.steigenberger.com
Inactive card CSS rules present (.inactive-card with grayscale, no flip, pointer-events-none)
All partner components (Hotels, Restaurants, BeachClubs, CafeBars) have inactive card handling
critical_code_review_comments: HotelPartners.jsx correctly implements price filter with PRICE_FILTERS array and useMemo for filtering
Sort toggle cycles through null → 'asc' → 'desc' → null correctly
Inactive cards sorted to end via getDisplayedItems in DataContext.jsx
All 4 partner components (Hotels, Restaurants, BeachClubs, CafeBars) have consistent inactive card handling
Search endpoint correctly uses booking_url || contact_url fallback (line 995 in server.py)
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. All 59 hotels are currently active. To test inactive card display, use admin API to set is_active=false on a hotel.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Price filter and sort features fully tested. All 59 hotels active (no inactive hotels to test greyed-out display). Inactive card CSS and component logic verified in code. Search booking_url fallback from contact_url working. To test inactive card visually, set a hotel to is_active=false via PUT /api/hotels/{id}.
